titles.title: I Know I Am the Bride

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know I am the Bride that You're returning for Dressed in garments white and wrinkle-free. I have no earthly love that I am holding to, You're the One who means everything to me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will sing, I will worship You I will bow myself down humbly at Your throne I will do anything, I will give everything To You alone!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the faithful God who keeps Your covenant There's not one thing You've said that You haven't done And someday when I see You standing face to face My praise for You will only have begun
